_meta.review_warning: AI-drafted v0. DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION until reviewed by a qualified Vic WHS practitioner and approved.

hazards.title: Suspended load fall
hazards.risk: Boulder slipping from sling or grab; crush injury

controls.title: Lift planned and performed by ticketed dogger / rigger if > 4t
Slings / grabs in current test date; pre-use inspection
No personnel under or in fall arc of suspended load

hazards.title: Hiab / crane / excavator struck-by
hazards.risk: Worker struck by boom / counterweight swing

controls.title: Operator HRWL valid for plant + lift

hazards.title: Boulder roll after placement
hazards.risk: Placed boulder rolling on uneven ground

controls.title: Boulder bedded into prepared pocket; keyed for stability before sling release
No personnel downhill of boulder during placement

hazards.title: Crane boom overhead power contact
hazards.risk: Hiab / crane boom contacting overhead lines

tasks: Pre-start: lift plan documented; weight of each boulder confirmed against plant SWL.
Confirm operator HRWL; rigger ticket if required by lift weight.
Toolbox: walk plan with operator + dogman + crew; signals.
Confirm 6.4m overhead clearance; electrical spotter if risk.
Prepare placement pocket: dig bed, place compacted gravel base.
Rig boulder: sling or grab per planned procedure; pre-use inspection.
Lift: dogman signals; no personnel in fall arc.
Place into pocket; bed and key; signal sling release only when stable.
